title: Title — The Ontology Advantage
description: Opening title slide establishing the strategic premise: Graph DB as the semantic foundation for enterprise agentic AI.

title: Slide 01 — Typical Agentic AI Architecture
description: Three-layer architecture: user interface, orchestration layer with memory and planning, and the LLM cognitive core with tool access.

title: Slide 02 — How Agents Interact with Data
description: The as-is state: agents connecting directly to relational databases, vector stores, and data lakes — each independently building its own context.

title: Slide 03 — Challenges with Traditional Approaches
description: Four critical failure modes: metric hallucination, semantic blindness, governance bypass, and context fragmentation.

title: Slide 04 — Graph Databases — The Landscape
description: Three families of graph databases: RDF knowledge graphs, property graphs, and vector-enhanced graphs with key platforms for each.

title: Slide 05 — How Graph DB Solves the Context Problem
description: Before/after comparison: fragmented direct access vs. unified ontology layer shared by all agents in the ecosystem.

title: Slide 06 — Technical Architecture of the Ontology Layer
description: Full technical stack: CTMS/EDC/eTMF sources feeding the graph DB ontology layer, which serves the clinical trial agent ecosystem via SPARQL, Cypher, REST, and GraphQL APIs.

title: Slide 07 — Governance, Compliance & Access Control
description: Four governance pillars: patient privacy and consent encoding, 21 CFR Part 11 audit trail, role-based data access for sites/sponsors/regulators, and end-to-end data lineage for inspections.

title: Slide 08 — Real-World Use Cases: Clinical Trials Operations
description: Two clinical trials use cases: patient cohort matching and site selection across 15M+ patient records, and safety signal detection via pharmacovigilance graph traversal.

title: Slide 09 — Strengths, Challenges & Mitigations
description: Honest executive assessment: four strengths, four challenges, and four concrete solutions for each challenge.

title: Thank You
description: Closing slide with a summary statement and two clear calls to action: schedule a discovery session or request a proof-of-concept.
